tweet: This pandemic has only heightened this crisis affecting Black women, especially in Alabama, which has some of the highest rates of maternal mortality in the nation. To put it in perspective: Black women are up to 3 times as likely to die in childbirth than white women.

tweet: Fairness and comity demand that the Senate not confirm any vacancy on the Supreme Court until the American people have chosen the next president. To do otherwise, I believe would undermine the very legitimacy of the Supreme Court.

name: Rep. Terri A. Sewell
tweet: This standard articulated by Senate Republicans was applied against President Obama’s nomination of Judge Merrick Garland eight months before the 2016 presidential election.

name: Rep. Terri A. Sewell
tweet: The nomination of Judge Amy Coney Barrett is clearly tainted by the hypocrisy of Senate Republicans to go back on their own promise not to fill a vacancy on the Supreme Court so close to a presidential election.

name: Rep. Terri A. Sewell
tweet: Voting rights are no different – Black Americans have faced obstacle after obstacle to practice their right to vote for the more than 100 years since we have been considered full citizens under the Constitution. We saw it in Georgia earlier this month!

name: Rep. Terri A. Sewell
